description: Munnar, Thekaddy, Alleppey, Trivandrum, and Kanyakumari offer an unforgettable journey through the lush landscapes and cultural richness of South India. Munnar, with its rolling tea gardens, misty mountains, and scenic valleys, is a haven for nature lovers and adventure seekers. Thekkady, famous for the Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary, offers the chance to spot exotic wildlife, enjoy a boat ride on the Periyar Lake, and explore spice plantations. Alleppey, known as the "Venice of the East," is famous for its backwaters, houseboat cruises, and tranquil atmosphere. Trivandrum, the capital city of Kerala, blends history and culture, with attractions like the Padmanabhaswamy Temple and the nearby beaches. Finally, Kanyakumari, located at the southernmost tip of India, is where the Arabian Sea, Bay of Bengal, and Indian Ocean meet, offering stunning sunsets, the Vivekananda Rock Memorial, and a spiritual aura. Together, these destinations create a perfect mix of nature, adventure, spirituality, and culture.

faqs.title: 1.What is the best time to visit Munnar, Thekaddy, Alleppey, Trivandrum, and Kanyakumari?
faqs.content: The best time to visit is from October to March, when the weather is pleasant for sightseeing and outdoor activities. Munnar and Thekkady can be cooler during these months, while the coastal regions are comfortable.

faqs.title: 2.How far are Munnar, Thekaddy, Alleppey, Trivandrum, and Kanyakumari from each other?
faqs.content:
Munnar to Thekkady: 90 km (approx. 2-3 hours by road)

Thekkady to Alleppey: 120 km (approx. 3-4 hours by road)

Alleppey to Trivandrum: 150 km (approx. 4-5 hours by road)

Trivandrum to Kanyakumari: 90 km (approx. 2 hours by road)

faqs.title: 3.What are the must-see attractions in Munnar?
faqs.content: Tea gardens, Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, Anamudi Peak, and Attukal Waterfalls.

faqs.title: 4.What activities can I do in Thekkady?
faqs.content: Boat rides on Periyar Lake, wildlife safaris in Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary, spice plantation tours, and trekking.

faqs.title: 5.What is special about Alleppey?
faqs.content: Famous for its serene backwaters, houseboat cruises, lush green landscapes, and peaceful atmosphere.
